name: Joe Sestak
subject: Cup of Joe, issue 5 - campaign update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Joe Sestak
body:
CUP OF JOE

August 24, 2019
Newsletter

This week started in Iowa and ended in California.

I organized a “Cup of Joe on the Issues” event in Corning, ran in a parade in Vinton, talked to local Democratic groups across Iowa, held a town hall at Fox Brewing in West Des Moines and spoke at the Frank LaMere Native American Presidential Forum and the Iowa AFL-CIO Convention. I then flew to San Francisco to speak at the Democratic National Committee’s summer meeting, where I shared my thoughts on the candidate and the message we need to win in 2020.

And this coming week, I’ll be the only Democratic Presidential candidate in Iowa!

Not your average Joe - Quartz

I was profiled in Quartz in a piece entitled “Not your average Joe... Meet the intriguing presidential candidate you haven’t seen on the debate stage”

The article said of me:

"You may not know Joe Sestak, though he is running for president of the United States. But wherever you’re from in the world, the Democratic candidate has likely been to, or at least seriously considered, your region of the globe. And he’d love to chat about it.

Sestak—call him Joe though, he insists—has been a congressman, a 3-star admiral in the Navy, a military adviser to former US president Bill Clinton, a college professor, a PhD student in political economy and government, a husband, a father, a wanderer, a global backpacker, and a long walker who crossed 422 miles of Pennsylvania by foot to meet with his constituents. He’s a progressive moderate who wants the US to resume its role as a global leader advancing 'the values-based world order from which we have retreated,' and a military man more inclined to diplomacy than warfare.”

You can read the full article here: https://qz.com/1687295/presidential-candidate-joe-sestak-wants-to-chat/

Democratic National Committee

I spoke at the Democratic National Committee’s summer meeting, where I talked about why I’m uniquely qualified to be President, why I got into politics in the first place and why I’m running now.

I explained my message of accountability, and why I believe that those who led us into that disastrous war in Iraq and dismantled safeguards on Wall Street should be held accountable for their decisions. We need someone who will stand up for ordinary Americans and accept responsibility for deeds, and not just words.

You can watch an extract of my speech here: https://twitter.com/thehill/status/1165021143385944065

AFL-CIO Iowa Convention

Trade unions are among the last organized forces fighting for working families in America. I’m proud to have had a 97% rating from the AFL-CIO during my time in Congress.

I spoke at the Iowa AFL-CIO Convention, where I shared thoughts about reforming OSHA, the minimum wage and protecting working families.

You can watch my speech in full here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OB6Rwbj1uzU

I spoke on Native American issues at the Frank LaMere Native American Presidential Forum. CLICK HERE TO WATCH: https://www.youtube.com/watch?time_continue=1&v=YUFiQJa80S4

I filmed a message talking about last weekend’s busy schedule - check out this snippet of campaign life! https://twitter.com/JoeSestak/status/1162914685483651072

I was asked by Sarah Grossman at the Huffington Post about how I practice “self-care” - how I deal with the pressures of the campaign trail. I responded that I do an early morning run of about three miles every day - it is the most relaxing way to just think and enjoy myself while away from home. Read more from me and other candidates here.

https://www.huffpost.com/entry/presidential-candidates-self-care-practices_l_5d52fc64e4b0cfeed1a45d8d

I am the only candidate in Iowa this coming week, according to the Des Moines Register. I’ll be marching in a parade, speaking at the Clay County Democrats Steak Fry, and talking to local Democratic Party groups in the 2nd District, in Winnebago County, in Story County and in Cerro Gordo County.

I’ll also be organizing three Cup of Joe on the Issues events - on education (in Muscatine), on agriculture and food (in Polk City) and on healthcare (in Riceville). Check out all my events here.

www.joesestak.com

For any queries, please email my communications team on press@joesestak.com [press@joesestak.com?subject=Des%20Moines%20Register%20Live%20Stream] .

Paid for by Friends of Joe Sestak

Joe Sestak
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

name: Francis Conole
subject: Climate change is real, humans caused it, and Katko has failed to take action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| [](conoleforcongress.com)
---

| | [**Congressman John Katko refuses to address the threat of climate change, putting the profits of his corporate donors over us. Add your name and demand he take action to prevent climate catastrophe immediately.**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/climate-crisis?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Congressman+John+Katko+refuses+to+addres&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190824_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190824_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190824_1_1")
* * *
Congressman John Katko refuses to understand that climate change is a crisis that requires immediate action.

He has voted to expand the use and extraction of fossil fuels, even on our public lands, knowing full well that fossil fuel use is causing climate change. He has voted against protecting the public from polluters, and he even refuses to adopt basic clean air regulations. All in the service of his corporate donors in Washington, D.C.

[**Congressman Katko is failing to address the threat of climate change. Demand he put us above his corporate donors and take action immediately.**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/climate-crisis?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+Congressman+Katko+is+failing+to+address+&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190824_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190824_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190824_1_1")

Sadly, Congressman Katko isn't just failing us on climate change. He has an abysmal record on all environmental issues. The League of Conservation Voters gave him a lifetime score of 27%. That's not just failing, that's barely even showing up for class.

Here are some of Congressman Katko's worst offenses.

He's refused to protect endangered fish stocks threatening the health of our oceans. He refuses to ensure protection of our native wildlife and natural preserves here in Central New York. He's even voted against ensuring we have safe drinking water.

[**Congressman Katko has a duty to put the people of Central New York above his corporate donors in Washington, D.C. If you agree, add your name today.**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/climate-crisis?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Congressman+Katko+has+a+duty+to+put+the+&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190824_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190824_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190824_1_1")

Onward,

Francis

|
---|---|---

|
---

"Basketball legend Bob Cousy received the Presidential Medal of Freedom, the nation’s highest civilian honor, in an Oval Office ceremony." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7305c461ca&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [NBA Star Bob Cousy Awarded Presidential Medal of Freedom, Nation's Highest Civilian Honor](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=848a11c3d8&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“Basketball legend Bob Cousy received the Presidential Medal of Freedom, the nation’s highest civilian honor, in an Oval Office ceremony on Thursday,” Frank Miles reports. Cousy played for the Boston Celtics from 1950 to 1963, winning six NBA championships and earning league MVP in 1957. “He is a great champion,” President Trump said.

** Watch:** [President Trump presents the Medal of Freedom ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=204eb03f26&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Trump Signs Order to Expedite Forgiving Student Loan Debt for Disabled Veterans](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fa278757a5&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Courier-Journal_
“President Donald Trump signed a memo to automatically discharge federal student loan debt for permanently and totally disabled veterans during his visit to Louisville Wednesday, where he addressed more than 1,000 veterans,” Chris Kenning reports. The President vowed to eliminate “every penny” of the average $30,000 in student loan debt facing roughly 25,000 disabled veterans.

** Watch:** [President Trump’s unwavering support for our wounded warriors](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=acf0bda14e&e=3ee4985eea)[ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d18e94415b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Team Trump’s Humane Fix for Migrant Families Crossing the Border](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=65e2af7ffa&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“How do you stop the torrent of kids risking their lives and coming to America illegally? One key way: by finally fixing the Flores agreement, as President Trump hopes to do,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes. The cap “set up a Catch-22: If kids can’t be held more than 20 days, and no one wants to separate them from their parents (or other adults they come with), then the only option is to release the whole family. That creates an enormous incentive for adult migrants to bring kids along, even if the journey puts them in danger.”
---
|
---
| [Tlaib, Omar All About Weakening Israel, They Stay Silent on Hamas, Palestinian Authority](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=74ff7bbb26&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“It should come as no shock that Democratic Reps. Ilhan Omar of Minnesota and Rashida Tlaib of Michigan are unwelcome in Israel,” Rep. Lee Zeldin (R-NY) writes. “The two congresswomen attack Israel while remaining silent on Hamas using women and children as human shields, denying humanitarian aid to its own people, calling jihad an obligation, and launching rockets into Israel that kill innocent civilians.”
---
|
---
| [American Workers Are Winning](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b4f4c71784&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox Business
“The U.S. economy has added millions of jobs, and even long-neglected sectors like manufacturing are having a resurgence,” Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross writes. Economic health has rebounded from the lows of the Obama Administration: “For the first time since 2009, year over year nominal hourly wage growth met or surpassed 3 percent under the Trump Administration.”
---
|
---
| [Irresponsible Dem Attacks on ICE Inspire Violence by Domestic Terrorists](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7e113e96f9&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“Some prominent Democrats have declared war on the Immigration and Customs Enforcement agency (ICE), threatening the lives of federal officials in order to advance a radical political agenda and a policy of open borders,” National Border Patrol Council President Brandon Judd writes. “Unfortunately, Democrats and their media enablers routinely downplay left-wing violence – and in some cases actively encourage it.”
---
|
---
| [Justice: 64% of Federal Arrests are Noncitizens, With a 200% Increase](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1773ac9f18&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“Federal arrests of noncitizens have jumped over 200% in the last 20 years and now account for 64% of those arrested,” Paul Bedard reports. “Over that 20-year period, groups such as MS-13 have surged, first in urban areas and recently into rural communities, and drug and human trafficking have also increased over the U.S.-Mexico border.”

** Watch: **[Wall construction is underway near Otay Mesa, California!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2692d09b62&e=3ee4985eea)

Sunday, August 25th marks the one year anniversary since the passing of Sen. John McCain [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=e95cfe652b93438db2e4282d75352f61&_e=pAt01tjmoG230qCtDJj90yYMYFi75rLLKypkzS9H3HxuXZQ9YF2EDoU21N-x4qkmG1JtjrjimT68MOuY98X5ydX8YRjJ1c9lU5gTU1zcPchug31HnTrdAATdldg4LV8SYyKkM2Foqe5BDyKN0-3cSKj7quPn0tNXdcDQgmcGhdPqTXQbwd6qJxYTby5sq6wlWPLH9qWufE7lHosMqYaVEw12TgMGZYP1cC2VXlhioEd434sUaSRLWXWAsjaYxS05K_-f8HV-0NKRLH-ytlXPLA%3D%3D) Sunday, August 25th marks the one year anniversary since the passing of Sen. John McCain.
Much has happened since that time and much has stayed the same. But the legacy of Sen. McCain lives on and grows stronger each day. When I think back, some of the things that I most admired about John were his underlying faith and love of his country, and his willingness to stand up and do what was best. There will never be another John McCain and we can all learn so much from him.
Sen. McCain was a fearless champion for our international alliances and fought for much of his life to ensure that our western values were at the forefront of our diplomatic and economic relationships with other nations. The world was quite literally a safer and more free place because his leadership.
Please consider taking a moment to [watch this short message from Cindy McCain](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=e95cfe652b93438db2e4282d75352f61&_e=pAt01tjmoG230qCtDJj9054VVb_xV7fIceHqVD1Pa5Dv-KLfnumRO2FCJeSizmG0o3UzkB9xoRgfY61x8r0trvhSbO60AelHQaVunxJ68u6XJHpghT9z8OZ1Dv9p5xcu5-Z-BouZcKm-fghgrGUcR-M02FbLSwuqYq7aclpNLzb4ScFcXZrnsuBWjwqYtjb2Qsef1wQzFH7lfGu6BEel-m3-BS1dwhgvwd5J7AZ_AW3b9XV-9y6kc_IU4Vb1R9dSRqcS3muKQJtqqKhGHtbCIMQn8twVY7yFGNG6ycECOCH1J1txEaWwd9a-UW5cGQAv) to learn more about how you can honor Sen. subject: Derek, can you take my Fall 2019 survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I don't think the Senate should even have gone on recess. We've got important issues facing our country like election security, gun violence, and healthcare that really can't wait.
|

| | ****[Take Mark 's Fall 2019 Survey](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d150/53d9897e/52cda011/1c8e2188/2290806246/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fall-2019-survey-tell-us-your-thoughts-")****
Derek,

Every year, the Senate takes off for the annual August recess. As nice as it would be to kick my feet up and take a month-long vacation, the truth is we've got work to do. This week, I was out campaigning for our General Assembly candidates. Next week, I'm hitting the road for a trip, with events across the Commonwealth.

Candidly, I don't think the Senate should even have _gone_ on recess. We've got important issues facing our country like election security, gun violence, and healthcare that really can't wait.

That's actually the reason I'm reaching out: **I want to know what issues _you_ want me to focus on when the Senate reconvenes in early September.**

**[Will you take my Fall 2019 survey and let me know what issues you want me to prioritize once the Senate returns from recess?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d150/53d9897e/52cda011/1c8e2188/2290806246/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fall-2019-survey-tell-us-your-thoughts-")**

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: I won’t accept these things as fate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Our planet is on fire and our president is in denial. There’s more than one gun for every soul in America. Hate crimes are on the rise three years straight. There are little kids — taken from their parents — in cages, sleeping on concrete floors under tin foil blankets.

Our planet is on fire and our president is in denial.
There’s more than one gun for every soul in America.
Hate crimes are on the rise three years straight.
There are little kids — taken from their parents — in cages, sleeping on concrete floors under tin foil blankets.
**I don’t accept this as our fate.** In fact, I believe this moment of maximum peril may also be our greatest moment of promise.
We can unleash the ingenuity and political will of millions of Americans to meet the existential threat of climate change before it’s too late. We can get assault weapons out of our stores and off our streets. We can turn the dangerous tides of hate before they grow even stronger. And we can rewrite our immigration laws in our own image.
It’s important that I said “we” here, because I can’t do any of these things alone. No one person can. Only we, together, can do them. And only if we build a big, bold, inclusive movement. One that goes everywhere, fights for everyone, and doesn’t write anyone off or take anyone for granted.
For any of this to be possible, millions of us have to give it our all and give it for all of us. Are you in? You can join us right now by donating here:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email-20190824](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/29882?refcode=ema20190824-50912&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=50912%2E444211%2E2T0iDc)
It doesn’t matter how much you give. The only thing that matters is that we build this together. All people, no PACs. All people, no corporations, special interests or D.C. lobbyists. All people, everywhere, all the time.
I’m so proud to be in this with you.
Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=50912%2E444211%2E2T0iDc). name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Sweat, tears, and beers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Every success I've ever been a part of came about because of an incredible team just like this one. Depending on a team is second nature to me because I learned long ago that collaboration pays off. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714eb/691c9bd/6eb5b010/11a444a4/3307306671/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team: Every success I've ever been a part of came about because of an incredible team just like this one. Working with others is second nature to me because I learned long ago that collaboration pays off.

When I was fresh off losing a job as a geologist, I joined forces with three friends to open the Wynkoop Brewing Company in 1988 in the middle of a neglected patch of downtown Denver. We succeeded on the strength of sweat and tears (and beers), as well as a stubborn commitment to supporting each other to the finish line--and the Wynkoop is still bringing people together over cold ones to this day.

When we made Colorado a model for the nation by expanding health care to nearly 400,000 Coloradans, passing the strictest methane regulations in the country, and beating the NRA by passing landmark gun violence prevention legislation, **we did it by coming together as a state --demanding meaningful change and not accepting anything less.**

I can't wait to take that spirit to the floor of the U.S. Senate to break the obstruction and get things done for a change.

**But this race is going to be tough. I need this team on my side every step of the way.**

Unlike Cory Gardner, I'm accepting no corporate PAC money. That means his warchest will be bigger than mine, but I believe we can do what it takes to fight off the well-funded attacks that are coming my way.

[**_Knowing this team is with me gives me all the motivation I need to take on the other side in this fight. If you 're ready to help build this campaign, chip in now--and let's win this, together._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190824_JH_20190824-fr-JH-grassroots-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Let's go,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190824_JH_20190824-fr-JH-grassroots-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=")

clean_body: Andrew isn’t throwing million-dollar fundraisers because that’s not what this campaign is about. This campaign is about people and bold ideas. It’s about putting Humanity First. | | | | | Friend -- | NBC News reported that another candidate attended fundraisers in the Hamptons and Martha’s Vineyard that raised over a MILLION DOLLARS. This makes our job harder and makes your support even more important. Andrew isn’t throwing million-dollar fundraisers because that’s not what this campaign is about. This campaign is about people and bold ideas. It’s about putting Humanity First. We’re proud of the way we raise money for this campaign -- almost 80% of our total fundraising comes from grassroots supporters giving small amounts. That’s likely the most of any of the candidates who’ve made the fall debate stage. But, here’s the problem. We must still compete with the other candidates raising millions from wealthy donors. Things are really ramping up here at HQ, and Kirsten and the campaign have had an incredible few weeks. Together, we're building a movement--one bold enough to defeat Donald Trump _and_ to take on the fights others write off as impossible.

And I don't want you to miss _any_ of it.

body:
Climate change is an existential crisis. We need a climate debate now. If enough of us speak out, we’re convinced the networks and the party will be able to give us what we need: a full climate debate.
#
Climate change is not “an issue” in this election. It’s the defining challenge of our time. That’s why 20 of the 23 Democrats running for president are asking for a climate debate. But we still don’t have one on the books, and it’s going to take a whole lot of public pressure to change that.
[Sign your name right now to the demand below to up the pressure:](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20190824-demand-climate-debate/?source=ema20190824-50975&t=1&akid=50975%2E444211%2EhT4zu3)
Climate change is an existential crisis. We need a climate debate now. **[I AGREE>>](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20190824-demand-climate-debate/?source=ema20190824-50975&t=2&akid=50975%2E444211%2EhT4zu3)**
---
If enough of us speak out, we’re convinced the networks and the party will be able to give us what we need: a full climate debate. That’s why adding your name today is so important. After you add it, hit the forward button on this email and spread it around.
\- Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you.
